content.problemStatement:
Given an M×NM×NM×N matrix of integers, find the rectangle (submatrix) that has the maximum sum of its elements. The rectangle can be of any size from 1×11×11×1 up to M×NM×NM×N.


Input Format

First line contains TTT, number of test cases
For each test case:

First line contains MMM and N,N,N, dimensions of matrix
Next MMM lines contain NNN space-separated integers each




Output Format

For each test case, print the maximum sum possible from any rectangle in the matrix.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Maximum sum rectangle is: 
-3 4 2 
8 10 1 
-1 1 7 
Total sum = 29

Explanation:
Test Case 1: Entire matrix sum = 4 
Test Case 2: Single element (-1) gives maximum sum
